latest.title: The True Story of the Battle of Takur Ghar
latest.desc: In this mashup, Alan Mack and Pete Blaber recount the Battle of Takur Ghar from two different positions in the fight — Mack from the pilot’s seat and Blaber from the perspective of a Delta Force commander on the ground.
